calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gloria Alicia Lanzarin, Petitioner in Propria Persona.
Benjamin Jose Lanzarin, husband to Petitioner.

The petitioner explained that she and Mr. Lanzarin initially married in 1966. They divorced in 1984 and reconciled in 1990, participating in a renewal of vows ceremony on October 13, 1990, at St. Paul Catholic Church in San Francisco, with witnesses present. The ceremony in 1990 was conducted under the assumption that it legally reinstated their marriage. The petitioner later discovered their marriage was not legally valid when attempting to access veteran benefits.

The court took the matter under submission with intent to grant the petition.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
